title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports that login fails with 'Invalid credentials' error even after resetting the password.

title: Payment not reflecting in dashboard
description: Customer completed payment but the transaction is not showing in their account dashboard.

title: Error 500 on checkout page
description: User encounters a server error when attempting to complete the checkout process.

title: Request for invoice copy
description: Customer needs a duplicate copy of the invoice for their recent purchase.

title: Account suspended without notice
description: Customer claims their account was suspended without receiving any prior notification.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: System shows upload success message but the profile picture does not update.

title: Subscription cancellation issue
description: Customer tried to cancel subscription but still being charged monthly.

title: Feature request for dark mode
description: Customer suggests adding a dark mode option for better night-time usability.

title: Incorrect product delivered
description: Customer received a different product than what was ordered.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer did not receive the password reset email after multiple attempts.
